zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Hedge於大約1531年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特時，他的父親James Hedge33歲，母親Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill29歲。他於1550年與Alice Burrough結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1582年在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特。

nameMeanings.name: Hedge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a hedge or enclosure, from Middle English hegge ‘hedge, fence’. In the early Middle Ages, hedges were not merely dividers between fields, but had an important defensive function when planted around a settlement or enclosure.
English: probably also a variant of   Hatch  , with voicing of the final consonant.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Hecke  .

variants.name: Hatch
meanings: English: habitational name from Hatch (Bedfordshire, Devon, Hampshire, Somerset, Wiltshire), Hacche in South Molton (Devon), or else a topographic name from residence near a hatch, a gate leading to a forest or sometimes a sluice-gate, from Middle English hacche ‘gate’ (Old English hæcce, Kentish Old English hec(c)). This name has been in Ireland since the 17th century, associated with County Meath and the nearby part of Louth.

variants.name: Hedges
meanings: English: variant of Hedge , from the plural or, with excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hedger
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name from Middle English heg(g)er ‘hedger, a maker or repairer of hedges’, or perhaps in some cases a topographic name for a ‘dweller by the hedge’; compare Hedge .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Hedge was born about 1531, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Hedge, was 33 and his mother, Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill, was 29. He married Alice Burrough in 1550. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1582, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Hedge est né environ 1531, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Hedge, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice Burrough en 1550. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1582, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Hedge um 1531 in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Hedge 33 und seine Mutter Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill 29. Er hat 1550 Alice Burrough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1582 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Burrough nel 1550. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1582, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Hedgeが約1531年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで生まれた時，父James Hedgeは33歳，母Lady Elysabethe Susan Hillは29歳であった。1550年にAlice Burroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1582年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Hedge(이)가 대략 1531년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Hedge(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1550년 Alice Burrough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1582년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Hedge родился около 1531 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Hedge было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Burrough в 1550 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1582 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
